zh.lifeSummary: 當Efa ferch Llywelyn於大約1270年出生時，她的父親Llewlyn ap Ynyr41歲，母親Margred Ferch Gruffudd45歲。她和Madog ap Iowerth Argylwydd ap Yr Hendwr至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1344年享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Efa ferch Llywelyn于大约1270年出生时，她的父亲Llewlyn ap Ynyr41岁，母亲Margred Ferch Gruffudd45岁。她和Madog ap Iowerth Argylwydd ap Yr Hendwr至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1344年享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Efa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Efa ferch Llywelyn was born about 1270, her father, Llewlyn ap Ynyr, was 41 and her mother, Margred Ferch Gruffudd, was 45. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Madog ap Iowerth Argylwydd ap Yr Hendwr. She died in 1344, at the age of 75.

fr.Of Yr Hendwr, Llandrillo-yn-ed, Merionet: Llandrillo, Merionethshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Efa ferch Llywelyn est née environ 1270, son père, Llewlyn ap Ynyr, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margred Ferch Gruffudd, avait 45 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Madog ap Iowerth Argylwydd ap Yr Hendwr. Elle est décédée en 1344, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Efa ferch Llywelyn um 1270 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Llewlyn ap Ynyr 41 und ihre Mutter Margred Ferch Gruffudd 45. Sie hatte mit Madog ap Iowerth Argylwydd ap Yr Hendwr mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1344 im Alter von 75 Jahren.

ja.lifeSummary: Efa ferch Llywelynが約1270年に生まれた時，父Llewlyn ap Ynyrは41歳，母Margred Ferch Gruffuddは45歳であった。彼女はMadog ap Iowerth Argylwydd ap Yr Hendwrとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1344年に75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Efa ferch Llywelyn(이)가 대략 1270년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Llewlyn ap Ynyr(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margred Ferch Gruffudd(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 Madog ap Iowerth Argylwydd ap Yr Hendwr(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1344년 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Efa ferch Llywelyn nasceu aproximadamente 1270, seu pai, Llewlyn ap Ynyr, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margred Ferch Gruffudd, tinha 45 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Madog ap Iowerth Argylwydd ap Yr Hendwr. Ela faleceu em 1344, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Efa ferch Llywelyn родилась около 1270 г., её отцу по имени Llewlyn ap Ynyr было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margred Ferch Gruffudd, 45. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Madog ap Iowerth Argylwydd ap Yr Hendwr. Она умерла в 1344 г. в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Efa ferch Llywelyn nació aproximadamente 1270, su papá, Llewlyn ap Ynyr, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Margred Ferch Gruffudd, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Madog ap Iowerth Argylwydd ap Yr Hendwr. Murió en 1344, a la edad de 75 años.
